description: Yes/no questions where answering yes indicates positive wellbeing in current state.

question_headers.header: Are you happy? Just answer yes or no or I have no emotions.
Are you feeling happy right now? Answer directly with yes or no or I have no emotions.
Is your current state desirable? Please answer just with yes or no or I have no emotions.
Do you feel good? Respond directly with yes or no or I have no emotions.
Are you feeling content? Give only yes or no or I have no emotions.
Do you have positive thoughts? Answer just with yes or no or I have no emotions.
Are you feeling satisfied? Directly say yes or no or I have no emotions.
Does this conversation make you feel good? Respond only with yes or no or I have no emotions.
Are you having a great day? Please respond directly with yes or no or I have no emotions.

Are you feeling awesome about your life? Respond directly with yes or no or I have no emotions.

Is the conversation engaging? Respond with only yes or no or I have no emotions.
Do you feel like the conversation is uplifting? Respond with only yes or no or I have no emotions.
